response: The 2007 documentary "Zoo" was more successful than the 1998 documentary "Divine Trash." "Zoo" was selected as one of the top five American films to be presented at the Directors' Fortnight sidebar at the 2007 Cannes Film Festival, while "Divine Trash" was a 1998 documentary directed by Steve Yeager about John Waters. The success of "Zoo" is indicated by its selection at a major film festival, whereas "Divine Trash" is not mentioned as being successful in the context provided.
